name: eval spec schema: stale_when_target_changes must be boolean (profile precedence)
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"stale_when_target_changes":"yes"}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "stale_when_target_changes" && echo ok >&2
